xanesnet.analysis.reporters package¶

Reporter implementations, helpers, and registry exports.

class xanesnet.analysis.reporters.Reporter(reporter_type)[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Base class for analysis reporters.

Reporters consume analysis results and write machine-readable files such as CSV, JSON, or YAML.

Parameters:

reporter_type (str) – Registered reporter name from the analysis configuration.

reporter_type¶

Registered reporter name from the analysis configuration.

__init__(reporter_type)[source]¶

Initialize a reporter instance.

abstractmethod report(results, output_dir)[source]¶

Generate report files from analysis results.

Parameters:

  • results (AnalysisResults) – Analysis pipeline outputs to report.

  • output_dir (Path) – Directory where report files should be written.

Return type:

None

class xanesnet.analysis.reporters.ReporterRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for reporter classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register a reporter class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[Reporter]], type[Reporter]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the reporter class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Reporter]

Returns:

Registered reporter class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no reporter is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered reporter names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

class xanesnet.analysis.reporters.ScalarReporter(reporter_type)[source]¶

Bases: Reporter

Write per-sample scalar values from selectors and collectors as CSV files.

Parameters:

reporter_type (str) – Registered reporter name from the analysis configuration.

__init__(reporter_type)[source]¶

Initialize a scalar CSV reporter.

report(results, output_dir)[source]¶

Write scalar value CSV files grouped by prediction reader and selector.

Parameters:

  • results (AnalysisResults) – Analysis pipeline outputs to report.

  • output_dir (Path) – Directory where the scalar_values report tree should be written.

Return type:

None

class xanesnet.analysis.reporters.StatisticsReporter(reporter_type, format='yaml', **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Reporter

Write aggregated statistics as structured files.

Produces one file per (selector, predictions_reader, aggregator) combination. Each file includes a metadata section for traceability and a statistics section containing the full aggregation output.

Supported formats: yaml (default), json.

Parameters:

  • reporter_type (str) – Registered reporter name from the analysis configuration.

  • format (str) – Output format. Supported values are "yaml" and "json".

  • **kwargs (Any) – Accepted for configuration compatibility and ignored.

SUPPORTED_FORMATS: ClassVar[tuple[str, str]] = ('yaml', 'json')¶
__init__(reporter_type, format='yaml', **kwargs)[source]¶

Initialize a statistics reporter.

Raises:

ValueError – If format is not one of SUPPORTED_FORMATS.

report(results, output_dir)[source]¶

Write one statistics file per aggregation result.

Parameters:

  • results (AnalysisResults) – Analysis pipeline outputs to report.

  • output_dir (Path) – Directory where the statistics report tree should be written.

Return type:

None

xanesnet.analysis.reporters.selector_label(selectors_config, sel_idx)[source]¶

Return the configured selector type label for a selector index.

Parameters:

  • selectors_config (list[dict[str, Any]]) – Selector configuration dictionaries in pipeline order.

  • sel_idx (int) – Zero-based selector index.

Return type:

str

Returns:

Configured selector_type when present, otherwise "unknown".

Submodules¶

xanesnet.analysis.reporters.base module¶

Base reporter interface and shared reporter helpers.

class xanesnet.analysis.reporters.base.Reporter(reporter_type)[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Base class for analysis reporters.

Reporters consume analysis results and write machine-readable files such as CSV, JSON, or YAML.

Parameters:

reporter_type (str) – Registered reporter name from the analysis configuration.

reporter_type¶

Registered reporter name from the analysis configuration.

__init__(reporter_type)[source]¶

Initialize a reporter instance.

abstractmethod report(results, output_dir)[source]¶

Generate report files from analysis results.

Parameters:

  • results (AnalysisResults) – Analysis pipeline outputs to report.

  • output_dir (Path) – Directory where report files should be written.

Return type:

None

xanesnet.analysis.reporters.base.selector_label(selectors_config, sel_idx)[source]¶

Return the configured selector type label for a selector index.

Parameters:

  • selectors_config (list[dict[str, Any]]) – Selector configuration dictionaries in pipeline order.

  • sel_idx (int) – Zero-based selector index.

Return type:

str

Returns:

Configured selector_type when present, otherwise "unknown".

xanesnet.analysis.reporters.registry module¶

Registry for analysis reporter implementations.

class xanesnet.analysis.reporters.registry.ReporterRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for reporter classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register a reporter class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[Reporter]], type[Reporter]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the reporter class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Reporter]

Returns:

Registered reporter class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no reporter is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered reporter names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

xanesnet.analysis.reporters.scalar module¶

Reporter that writes scalar per-sample values to CSV files.

class xanesnet.analysis.reporters.scalar.ScalarReporter(reporter_type)[source]¶

Bases: Reporter

Write per-sample scalar values from selectors and collectors as CSV files.

Parameters:

reporter_type (str) – Registered reporter name from the analysis configuration.

__init__(reporter_type)[source]¶

Initialize a scalar CSV reporter.

report(results, output_dir)[source]¶

Write scalar value CSV files grouped by prediction reader and selector.

Parameters:

  • results (AnalysisResults) – Analysis pipeline outputs to report.

  • output_dir (Path) – Directory where the scalar_values report tree should be written.

Return type:

None

xanesnet.analysis.reporters.statistics module¶

Reporter that writes aggregated statistics to YAML or JSON files.

class xanesnet.analysis.reporters.statistics.StatisticsReporter(reporter_type, format='yaml', **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Reporter

Write aggregated statistics as structured files.

Produces one file per (selector, predictions_reader, aggregator) combination. Each file includes a metadata section for traceability and a statistics section containing the full aggregation output.

Supported formats: yaml (default), json.

Parameters:

  • reporter_type (str) – Registered reporter name from the analysis configuration.

  • format (str) – Output format. Supported values are "yaml" and "json".

  • **kwargs (Any) – Accepted for configuration compatibility and ignored.

SUPPORTED_FORMATS: ClassVar[tuple[str, str]] = ('yaml', 'json')¶
__init__(reporter_type, format='yaml', **kwargs)[source]¶

Initialize a statistics reporter.

Raises:

ValueError – If format is not one of SUPPORTED_FORMATS.

report(results, output_dir)[source]¶

Write one statistics file per aggregation result.

Parameters:

  • results (AnalysisResults) – Analysis pipeline outputs to report.

  • output_dir (Path) – Directory where the statistics report tree should be written.

Return type:

None
